description: Consolidate xai-search features into xai skill and prepare for xai-search removal

userStories.title: Enhance search-x.js with advanced handle filters
userStories.description: As a user searching X/Twitter, I want to exclude specific handles so that I can filter out spam/bot accounts from results
acceptanceCriteria: Add --allowed-handles flag (alias for --handles)
Add --excluded-handles flag to exclude specific handles
Update parseArgs() to handle new flags
Update API request to include excluded_x_handles filter
Backward compatibility: existing --handles flag still works
Help text updated with new flags and examples
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add flexible date filtering to search-x.js
userStories.description: As a user, I want to specify exact date ranges (from/to) so that I can search specific time periods beyond 'last N days'
acceptanceCriteria: Add --from-date flag accepting ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
Add --to-date flag accepting ISO 8601 format
Validate date formats (basic validation)
Update API request to include from_date and to_date filters
When --days is used without --from-date, calculate from_date automatically
--from-date and --to-date can be used independently or together
Help text updated with date examples
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add media analysis flags to search-x.js
userStories.description: As a user, I want to enable image/video understanding so that Grok can analyze visual content in tweets
acceptanceCriteria: Add --image-understanding boolean flag
Add --video-understanding boolean flag
Update API request to include enable_image_understanding when flag present
Update API request to include enable_video_understanding when flag present
Flags work independently or together
Help text updated with media analysis examples
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create web-search.js script
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search the web using Grok's web_search tool so that I can find documentation and articles beyond X/Twitter
acceptanceCriteria: Create new file ~/clawdbot-skills/xai/scripts/web-search.js
Script structure similar to chat.js (reuse API boilerplate)
Support --domains flag to filter by specific domains
Support --exclude-domains flag to exclude specific domains
Support --image-understanding flag for web page images
Support --max-results flag to limit number of results
Use web_search tool (not x_search)
Include help text with examples
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: New file, based on chat.js structure

userStories.title: Update xai SKILL.md documentation
userStories.description: As a skill user, I want comprehensive documentation so that I know about all available features
acceptanceCriteria: Document all new search-x.js flags with examples
Add web-search.js section with usage examples
Add note that xai now replaces xai-search functionality
Update triggers to include web search keywords
Add advanced search examples combining multiple filters
Maintain existing documentation for chat.js and models.js
Markdown formatting is correct
All code examples are accurate

userStories.title: Update xai README.md
userStories.description: As a developer installing the skill, I want updated README so that I know about web search capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: Add web search section to README
Update examples with advanced search-x.js usage
Add installation/usage for web-search.js
Update feature list to include web search
Mention xai-search deprecation (if applicable)
Markdown formatting is correct

userStories.title: Add smoke tests for enhanced features
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want basic tests so that I can verify new features work correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Create test script or document test cases
Test each new flag individually (excluded-handles, from-date, etc.)
Test flag combinations (e.g., --handles + --from-date + --image-understanding)
Test backward compatibility (old commands still work)
Test web-search.js basic functionality
Document any edge cases or known limitations
All tests pass
userStories.notes: Can be manual test checklist or simple test script

technicalNotes.compatibility: Must maintain backward compatibility with existing search-x.js usage
references: Existing chat.js for API boilerplate patterns

outOfScope: Removing xai-search skill (separate task after validation)
Advanced search result ranking/sorting (if not supported by API)
Combined search script (x_search + web_search in one call - future enhancement)
definition_of_done: All user stories pass acceptance criteria
Typecheck passes for all modified/new files
No breaking changes to existing scripts
